EmailTemplate.name: EOI Form Link - Customer
EmailTemplate.subject: EOI Form Submission
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!RW_EOI__c.RW_Primary_First_Name__c} {!RW_EOI__c.RW_Primary_Last_Name__c},
Thank you for showing interest in our project {!RW_EOI__c.RW_Project_Name__c}. Please find below the "Expression of Interest" link for your kind perusal. You may call on {!SMPhoneNumber} for any assistance.
{!EOIFormLink} to fill the EOI Form.
Regards, Runwal Group
